title: crepis fraasii
intro: Crepis fraasii, also known as Fraas' hawksbeard, is a perennial plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, Crepis fraasii has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and inflammation, due to its high content of flavonoids and sesquiterpene lactones. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating rheumatic pain, and acting as a natural diuretic. Crepis fraasii can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties.
